title: Voice memo — Sep 25 2019 (figuring out points)
html:
11-second voice memo from Sep 25 2019 (likely grants pass high school) — Yahir muttering about "trying to figure out how to take those points… oh fuck this dude," then a "wait a minute." Background-overhear / in-the-moment frustration capture; lives in the same grants pass teen era reflex-recording cluster as 2019 04 01 prediction.

grants pass teen era · grants pass high school · recording as note · react not what happens

related.label: It Doesn't Matter What Happens, It Matters How You React
